hero.title: Professional Chauffeur Service
hero.subtitle: Experience Dubai with Elite Professional Drivers
hero.description: Experience luxury transportation with our elite professional chauffeurs. Available 24/7 across Dubai and UAE, our multilingual drivers provide unparalleled service, discretion, and local expertise.

hourly.name: Hourly Chauffeur
hourly.description: Flexible hourly service for multiple stops and waiting time
hourly.ideal: Shopping trips, business meetings, city tours

daily.name: Full Day Chauffeur
daily.ideal: Business delegations, tourist groups, special events

transfer.name: Point-to-Point Transfer
transfer.ideal: Airport transfers, hotel transfers, event transportation

events.name: Event Chauffeur
events.description: Specialized service for weddings and special occasions

routes.title: Popular Chauffeur Routes

popular.route: Dubai Mall → Gold Souk → Dubai Marina

routes.note: * Prices include vehicle, chauffeur, fuel, and basic refreshments

steps.title: Choose Your Service
steps.description: Select from hourly, daily, transfer, or event chauffeur services based on your needs

steps.title: Select Your Vehicle
steps.description: Choose from our fleet of Phantom, Ghost, Cullinan, Dawn, or Wraith

steps.title: Meet Your Chauffeur
steps.description: Your professional chauffeur arrives 10 minutes early, impeccably dressed and ready

steps.title: Enjoy the Journey
steps.description: Relax in ultimate luxury while your chauffeur handles everything

testimonials.name: Maria Fernandez
testimonials.text: Our chauffeur Ahmed was exceptional. Professional, punctual, and knew Dubai inside out. Made my business trip seamless.

testimonials.name: Sheikh Mohammed
testimonials.text: I use their hourly service regularly. The flexibility and professionalism are unmatched. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Alexandra Petrova
testimonials.text: Our Russian-speaking chauffeur made our Dubai vacation perfect. He was like a personal tour guide!

cta.title: Experience Elite Chauffeur Service
cta.description: Professional chauffeurs available 24/7. Book now and travel Dubai in unparalleled comfort and style.

recommendedModels.title: Popular Chauffeur Vehicles
recommendedModels.subtitle: Choose your preferred Rolls-Royce with professional driver

models.ghost: Most popular chauffeur car. Smooth Planar suspension and refined cabin make every journey effortless.
models.phantom: The pinnacle of chauffeured luxury. Extended Wheelbase rear suite with privacy glass and starlight ceiling.
models.cullinan: SUV chauffeur service for families and groups. 7 seats of luxury with ample luggage space.
